user.title: Include a GARDENA device
user.description:
Set your device in inclusion mode (refer to your device's manual if unsure how), then click **Next**.

**Note:** Devices included here are paired locally with the gateway and will not show up in the GARDENA app. To use the app, include the device through the app instead.

abort.no_devices_found: No includable devices found. Make sure your device is in inclusion mode and try again.

error.inclusion_failed: Failed to include the device. Please try again.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your GARDENA smart Gateway
data_description.password: First block of the gateway ID printed on the back of the device (e.g. `0824b95b` from `0824b95b-996c-48f7-83dc-…`).

discovery_confirm.title: GARDENA smart Gateway found
discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the GARDENA smart Gateway **{name}**?

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your GARDENA smart Gateway
data_description.password: First block of the gateway ID printed on the back of the device (e.g. `0824b95b` from `0824b95b-996c-48f7-83dc-…`).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the gateway

abort.already_in_progress: It seems the gateway has been autodetected, click "Add" on discovered integration instead
